'''Myn Kyneugh''' served as a [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Royal Guard]] in service to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
[[File:Kyneugh.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Myn Kyneugh]]
The teacher of many Royal Guard trainees, Kyneugh was unswervingly loyal and remembered nothing of his past before serving the Emperor. He was an early teacher of [[Carnor Jax]] and [[Kir Kanos]].<ref name="DS2 Card Game" /> He led the [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Royal Guards]] that followed their master to the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]]<ref name="DS2 Personnel">{{SW|url=news/death-star-ii-personnel-and-imperial-human-resources|text=Death Star II Personnel: An Imperial Human Resources Guide|nolive=1}}</ref> and died when it exploded.<ref name="RotJ" />
